text.title: VUI Market Context Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for vui_market_brief.json — the structured report this methodology produces.

example.note: Missing refreshed_at, model, platforms; data item missing source_url, geo, denominator; only 1 metric (min 4).

list.item: A `data[].value` without a `geo` field — scope-less stats are non-citable.
A `data[]` item where `source_url` host is not in the trusted-source allowlist.
Brief where `today - refreshed_at` > 90 days at publish time.
